View this email in your browser

The Rise of Variable Fonts

Variable fonts are revolutionizing web typography. Designers can now use a single font file to access an entire range of weights, widths, and styles.

This technology reduces page load times while giving designers unprecedented control over their typography. Read more in this deep dive article.

Designing for Accessibility in 2026

Accessibility is no longer optional. New regulations and growing awareness mean that every designer must consider inclusive design from the start.

Check out our accessibility checklist to ensure your designs meet WCAG 2.2 standards.
